products.name: WiDy SenS 640
products.descriptor: VGA-resolution SWIR InGaAs camera with HDR and SDI output for airborne applications

evidence.snippet:
[HDR & High sensitivity SWIR camera](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/widy-sens-640/)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**WiDy SenS 640 with SDI output**
---------------------------------
The **WiDy SenS 640H-STE** provides straightforward **digital video SDI output** interfacing with the most current electronic **video platforms**.
Ideal for **airborne fire fighting**, **search and rescue**, and **agricultural mapping**.
[Learn more](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/widy-sens-640/)

products.name: WiDy NaNo 640
products.descriptor: Compact lightweight SWIR InGaAs camera for UAV embedded vision integration

evidence.snippet:
*   Optimized for **embedded vision and aerial platforms**
[WiDy SenS 640](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/widy-sens-640/)/ [WiDy NaNo 640](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/widy-nano-640/)

products.name: SenS 1920
products.descriptor: Full HD 1920×1080 SWIR InGaAs camera with ultra-low 25e- noise for ISR

evidence.snippet:
**SenS 1920**
-------------
*   **Full HD SWIR camera (1920x1080px@8µm pixel pitch)**
*   **High sensitivity, ultra-low noise 25e-**
*   **Dynamic range 64dB**
*   **CameraLink (New) & USB 3.0** interface.
Ideal for **ISR** and **semiconductor inspection** **applications**.
[Learn more](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/sens-1920/)

products.name: NSC1601
products.descriptor: VGA-resolution InGaAs SWIR sensor with up to 120 dB high dynamic range

evidence.snippet:
*   #### **NSC1601 Sensor**:
    High Sensitivity and HDR: NIT’s VGA-resolution [NSC1601](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/nsc1601/) InGaAs sensor offers an industry-leading high dynamic range (HDR) of up to 120dB, capturing detailed images across a wide range of lighting conditions. Its high sensitivity makes it ideal for detecting small objects or people at great distances, even under low-light conditions.

products.name: SenS 1280
products.descriptor: HD 1280×1024 SWIR InGaAs camera with on-board smart image processing for surveillance

evidence.snippet:
[HD resolution SWIR camera](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/sens-1280/)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**SenS 1280 – Smart version**
-----------------------------
*   NIT’s state-of-the-art **10μm** pixel pitch sensor
*   HD (**1280×1024**) format camera
*   **On-board Smart Image Processing**
*    is now available in **CameraLink,** **HD-SDI & CxP**. **GenICam** compliant.
Ideal for **machine vision** and **surveillance applications**.
[Learn more](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/sens-1280/)

products.name: WiDy SenS 320
products.descriptor: QVGA SWIR InGaAs camera with dual HDR/high-sensitivity mode up to 10 kHz ROI

evidence.snippet:
[High speed & Low price point SWIR camera](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/widy-sens-320/)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**WiDy SenS 320**
-----------------
*   QVGA SWIR camera
*   Unique dual-response mode **HDR & High sensitivity,**
*   delivering **up to 10kHz (ROI), 1kHz full frame**
*   **Exposure time** **1µs mini**
*   USB 3.0, CameraLink and **GigE (NEW)**
Ideal for **R&D** and **industrial** **applications**.
[Learn more](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/widy-sens-320/)

products.name: LiSaSWIR 2048
products.descriptor: 2048-pixel SWIR InGaAs line-scan array camera for high-speed industrial inspection

evidence.snippet:
[SWIR Line-scan array camera](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/lisaswir-2048/)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**LiSaSWIR 2048 v2**
--------------------
**Line-scan** array camera with **2048 pixels** for industrial inspection.
**High-speed & High-performance**
*   **2048×1** resolution
*   **8**x**14µm** | **8**x**200µm** pixel size
*   **\>110Hz** full resolution
*   Low noise **90e-** & high dynamic range
*   **Smart CameraLink**
*   **GenICam compliant**
[Learn more](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/lisaswir-2048/)

products.name: LiSa SWIR 2048R M-STE2
products.descriptor: Rectangular-pixel 2048-element SWIR line-scan camera based on LiSaSWIR 2048 platform

evidence.snippet:
Introduction New Imaging Technologies (NIT), a LYNRED company, announces that theLiSa SWIR 2048R M-STE2 is now available for order. The camera was first presented at SPIE Photonics West 2026 and is now ready for commercial deployment. Rectangular-Pixel SWIR Camera...
[![Upcoming Rectangular SWIR Camera at Photonics West 2026](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20400%20250'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/news/upcoming-rectangular-swir-camera/)

products.name: HiPe SenS 640
products.descriptor: High-performance SWIR InGaAs camera with low noise, high sensitivity, and air cooling

evidence.snippet:
[High-performance SWIR camera](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/hipe-sens-640/)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**HiPe SenS 640**
-----------------
High-performance SWIR camera with **low noise**, **high sensitivity**, and **long exposure time** with simple **air cooling**.
Best performance and lowest price of its class for **scientific** and **medical applications**.
[Learn more](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/hipe-sens-640/)

products.name: MC1105F
products.descriptor: Compact 1.3 Mpixel OEM night-vision module for intensified imaging with 140 dB HDR

evidence.snippet:

[MC1105F](https://new-imaging-technologies.com/product/mc1105f/ "MC1105F")
Compact and low-power night vision module dedicated to intensified solutions.
*   **USB3.0 or CameraLink**
*   **1.3 Mpixels**
*   **HDR** up to **140dB** with proprietary **Logarithmic** response
*   Delivered without Fiber Optic Plate (FOP) – **18mm diagonal.**
*   OEM version – Module supplied without housing

No NDAA or Blue UAS compliance claims appear anywhere in the fetched corpus. NIT is a French company (LYNRED subsidiary, 'Made in France' logo), so NDAA applicability is unclear without explicit vendor statement.
Individual product detail pages for all 12 SWIR/CMOS SKUs were skipped (skipped_budget) — detailed specs, pricing, and any compliance language are not yet captured.
